parsed.summary: Well-structured multi-provider AI proxy with good performance optimizations, but has some security and error handling concerns.

bugs.description: Potential null reference when accessing JsonElement properties without checking if they exist first
StreamReader constructor may throw exception if request body is not properly disposed

security_issues.description: API key comparison uses insecure string comparison that could be vulnerable to timing attacks
No input validation on environment variables could lead to injection attacks

performance_issues.description: Using JsonDocument.Parse on entire request body loads entire payload into memory, potentially causing high memory usage for large requests
String concatenation in StreamAndCache creates unnecessary string allocations

improvements.description: Use constant-time string comparison for API key validation to prevent timing attacks
Consider using System.Text.Json streaming APIs instead of loading entire JSON document into memory
Add proper exception handling around JSON parsing to prevent crashes on malformed requests
Use StringBuilder pooling to reduce memory allocations during streaming

results.error: Response status code does not indicate success: 500 (Internal Server Error).
Response status code does not indicate success: 500 (Internal Server Error).
